Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Allow Additional Time To Depose Plaintiff Jennifer Lapierre And To Compel Her To Attend A Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Tuesday, December 23, 2014:
Elise R. Sanguinetti of Sanguinetti Law (510.629.4877), attorney for Plaintiff JENNIER LAPIERRE;
Kelli E. George of The Law Offices of Melissa M. Ballard, attorney for Defendant SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART

ARGUED - R U L I N G, the Court adopts its tentative ruling: Defendant SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART'S, a nonprofit corporation, Motion For An Order To Allow Additional Time To Depose Plaintiff Jennifer Lapierre And To Compel Her To Attend A Deposition is Granted. Both parties request for sanctions are denied. Defendant's counsel will prepare and submit a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; Reporter: Joan F. Martin, CSR No. 6036, Tel.: 415.421.3021. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
